name: tuturuuu
description: Codex operating guidance, validation, CI, and focused workflows for the Tuturuuu platform monorepo.

interface.shortDescription: Work in the Tuturuuu platform repo with local conventions.
interface.longDescription: Provides Codex skills for safe Tuturuuu platform development, including repo-wide workflow rules, Flutter mobile task-board guidance, Supabase database patterns, CI/docs maintenance, review-comment follow-through, and plugin validation.
defaultPrompt: Use $tuturuuu-platform to make this platform change and run the right checks.
Use $tuturuuu-database to update the Supabase schema or API write path safely.
Use $tuturuuu-ci-docs to update the workflow, docs page, and validation follow-through.
Use $tuturuuu-mobile-task-board to fix this Flutter task-board behavior and verify it.
Use $tuturuuu-review-comments to re-check this PR, fix actionable review threads, resolve addressed comments, and report what remains.
